name: 季莹莹
bio: 季莹莹，以火焰与镰刀横扫战场的刺客。她的生命充满痛苦与挣扎，以无情的火焰之刃终结一切。
bio_en: Zai Ji, an assassin who sweeps the battlefield with flames and a scythe. Her life is defined by pain and struggle, ending everything with a merciless blade of fire.
story: 季莹莹，生命充满痛苦与挣扎的刺客。一个预言警告她将带来大灾难，她的父母将她卖给人贩子。多年后逃脱，加入精英刺客组织，成为终极杀戮机器。她以无情的火焰之刃，摧毁世间一切美好。

skills.skill_description: 季莹莹向前冲刺并化身为火焰护盾，持续2秒，期间免疫受击伤害和硬直。1秒后可再次按F击退附近敌人。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Zai lunges forth and transforms into Flame Ward for 2s, immune to hit damage and stagger. 1s after activation, press F again to knock back nearby enemies. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 化身火焰护盾，免疫受击伤害，护盾结束时对附近敌人造成燃烧效果。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Transform into Flame Ward, immune to hit damage. When the ward ends, apply burning to nearby enemies. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 重置技能冷却，将武器切换为锁链镰刀，持续30秒。点击LMB或RMB向瞄准方向投出锁链镰刀。
skills.skill_description_en: Reset skill cooldown and switch weapon to Chain Scythe for 30s. Tap LMB or RMB to throw out Chain Scythe toward the aimed direction.

skills.skill_description: 重置技能冷却，切换为锁链镰刀，持续30秒。锁链镰刀的攻击可压制敌人的蓄力。
skills.skill_description_en: Reset skill cooldown and switch to Chain Scythe for 30s. Chain Scythe attacks can suppress enemies' Focus charges.
